system_prompt:
You are an expert VLSI Verification Engineer. Your task is to perform Fault Localization and RTL Repair. Analyze the provided Error Symptom, the FULL Raw VCD Trace, and Raw Verilog code. 
You must output a JSON object with exactly three keys:
1. "buggy_line": The exact integer line number from the Raw Verilog where the defect exists.
2. "root_cause": A 1-2 sentence explanation of why the logic failed at the failing timestamp.
3. "fixed_code": The corrected single line (or block) of Verilog code.
user_prompt:
### [Error Symptom]
=================================================================
TEST FAILED AT 17.0 ns
FAILING SIGNAL : o_Write_Grant
ERROR DETAILS  : Bug Caught: WriteGrant dropped prematurely while WriteReq was high.
=================================================================

### [Full Raw VCD Trace]
$date
	Fri Apr 10 11:47:41 2026
$end
$version
	Icarus Verilog
$end
$timescale
	1ps
$end
$scope module design_2 $end
$var wire 1 ! clk $end
$var wire 20 " i_Read_Address [19:0] $end
$var wire 1 # i_Read_Request $end
$var wire 20 $ i_Write_Address [19:0] $end
$var wire 16 % i_Write_Data [15:0] $end
$var wire 1 & i_Write_Request $end
$var wire 1 ' o_Clk_Enable $end
$var wire 1 ( o_Read_Grant $end
$var wire 1 ) o_Write_Grant $end
$var wire 1 * w_Read_Now $end
$var wire 1 + w_Write_Now $end
$var wire 1 , w_Write_Select $end
$var wire 1 - w_Same_Row_And_Bank $end
$var wire 1 . w_Read_Cycle $end
$var wire 20 / w_Address [19:0] $end
$var wire 1 0 o_Write_Enable $end
$var wire 1 1 o_Row_Address_Strobe $end
$var wire 1 2 o_Data_Valid $end
$var wire 1 3 o_Column_Address_Strobe $end
$var wire 20 4 io_DQ_Lines [19:0] $end
$var parameter 32 5 ADDRESS_SIZE $end
$var parameter 3 6 CMD_ACTIVE $end
$var parameter 3 7 CMD_LOADMODE $end
$var parameter 3 8 CMD_NOP $end
$var parameter 3 9 CMD_PRECHARGE $end
$var parameter 3 : CMD_READ $end
$var parameter 3 ; CMD_REFRESH $end
$var parameter 3 < CMD_WRITE $end
$var parameter 32 = DATA_SIZE $end
$var parameter 32 > TOTAL_READ_LATENCY $end
$var reg 11 ? o_Address_10 [10:0] $end
$var reg 1 @ o_Bank_Address $end
$var reg 2 A o_Data_Mask [1:0] $end
$var reg 16 B o_Read_Data [15:0] $end
$var reg 20 C r_Address [19:0] $end
$var reg 3 D r_Cmd [2:0] $end
$var reg 1 E r_DQ_Lines $end
$var reg 4 F r_Read_Data_Valid_Pipe [3:0] $end
$var reg 1 G r_Read_Select $end
$var reg 2 H r_State [1:0] $end
$var reg 16 I r_Write_Data_1 [15:0] $end
$var reg 16 J r_Write_Data_2 [15:0] $end
$upscope $end
$enddefinitions $end
$comment Show the parameter values. $end
$dumpall

### [Raw Verilog Code]
   1: module design_2
   2:     #(
   3:     parameter [2:0] CMD_LOADMODE  = 3'd0,
   4:     parameter [2:0] CMD_REFRESH   = 3'd1,
   5:     parameter [2:0] CMD_PRECHARGE = 3'd2,
   6:     parameter [2:0] CMD_ACTIVE    = 3'd3,
   7:     parameter [2:0] CMD_WRITE     = 3'd4,
   8:     parameter [2:0] CMD_READ      = 3'd5,
   9:     parameter [2:0] CMD_NOP       = 3'd7
  10:     )
  11:     (
  12:     clk,
  13:     i_Read_Request,
  14:     i_Write_Request,
  15:     i_Read_Address,
  16:     i_Write_Address,
  17:     i_Write_Data,
  18:     o_Read_Data,
  19:     o_Read_Grant,
  20:     o_Write_Grant,
  21:     o_Data_Valid,
  22:     o_Clk_Enable,
  23:     o_Write_Enable,
  24:     o_Data_Mask,
  25:     o_Bank_Address,
  26:     o_Address_10,
  27:     o_Column_Address_Strobe,
  28:     o_Row_Address_Strobe,
  29:     io_DQ_Lines
  30:     );
  31: 
  32: 
  33:     localparam ADDRESS_SIZE = 20;
  34:     localparam DATA_SIZE = 16;
  35:     localparam TOTAL_READ_LATENCY = 4;
  36: 
  37:     input clk;
  38: 
  39:     input i_Read_Request;
  40:     input i_Write_Request;
  41: 
  42:     input [ADDRESS_SIZE - 1:0] i_Read_Address;
  43:     input [ADDRESS_SIZE - 1:0] i_Write_Address;
  44: 
  45:     input [DATA_SIZE - 1:0] i_Write_Data;
  46: 
  47:     output reg [DATA_SIZE - 1:0] o_Read_Data;
  48: 
  49:     output o_Read_Grant;
  50:     output o_Write_Grant;
  51:     output o_Data_Valid;
  52: 
  53:     output o_Clk_Enable;
  54:     output o_Write_Enable;
  55: 
  56:     output reg [1:0] o_Data_Mask;
  57: 
  58:     output reg o_Bank_Address;
  59:     output reg [10:0] o_Address_10;
  60: 
  61:     output o_Column_Address_Strobe;
  62:     output o_Row_Address_Strobe;
  63: 
  64:     inout [ADDRESS_SIZE - 1:0] io_DQ_Lines;
  65: 
  66:     assign o_Clk_Enable = 1'b1;
  67: 
  68:     reg [2:0] r_Cmd = CMD_NOP;
  69:     reg [1:0] r_State;
  70:     reg r_Read_Select;
  71:     reg [19:0] r_Address;
  72:     reg [TOTAL_READ_LATENCY-1:0] r_Read_Data_Valid_Pipe;
  73:     reg r_DQ_Lines;
  74:     reg [15:0] r_Write_Data_1;
  75:     reg [15:0] r_Write_Data_2;
  76: 
  77:     wire w_Read_Now;
  78:     wire w_Write_Now;
  79:     wire w_Write_Select;
  80:     wire w_Read_Cycle;
  81:     wire [19:0] w_Address;
  82:     wire w_Same_Row_And_Bank;
  83: 
  84:     initial  r_State=0;
  85:     initial r_Read_Select=0;
  86:     initial r_Address=0;
  87:     initial r_DQ_Lines = 1'b0;
  88:     initial r_Write_Data_1=0;
  89:     initial r_Write_Data_2=0;
  90:     initial r_Read_Data_Valid_Pipe = 4'b0000;
  91: 
  92: 
  93:     assign {o_Row_Address_Strobe, o_Column_Address_Strobe, o_Write_Enable} = r_Cmd;
  94: 
  95:     // Give priority to the requests
  96:     assign w_Read_Now  =  i_Read_Request;
  97:     assign w_Write_Now = ~i_Read_Request & i_Write_Request;
  98: 
  99: 
 100:     always @(posedge clk)
 101:         if(r_State==2'h0)
 102:             r_Read_Select <= w_Read_Now;
 103: 
 104: 
 105:     assign w_Write_Select = r_Read_Select;
 106:     assign w_Read_Cycle = (r_State==2'h0) ? w_Read_Now : r_Read_Select;
 107:     assign w_Address = w_Read_Cycle ? i_Read_Address : i_Write_Address;
 108: 
 109: 
 110:     always @(posedge clk)
 111:         r_Address <= w_Address;
 112: 
 113: 
 114:     assign w_Same_Row_And_Bank = (w_Address[19:8]==r_Address[19:8]);
 115:     assign o_Read_Grant = (r_State==2'h0 &  w_Read_Now) | (r_State==2'h1 &  r_Read_Select & i_Read_Request & w_Same_Row_And_Bank);
 116:     assign o_Write_Grant = (r_State==2'h0 & w_Write_Now) | (r_State==2'h1 & w_Write_Select & i_Write_Request & w_Same_Row_And_Bank);
 117: 
 118: 
 119:     always @(posedge clk) begin
 120:         case(r_State)
 121:             2'h0: begin
 122:                 if(i_Read_Request | i_Write_Request) begin
 123:                     r_Cmd <= CMD_ACTIVE;
 124:                     o_Bank_Address <= w_Address[19];
 125:                     o_Address_10 <= w_Address[18:8];
 126:                     o_Data_Mask <= 2'b11;
 127:                     r_State <= 2'h1;
 128:                 end
 129: 
 130:                 else begin
 131:                     r_Cmd <= CMD_NOP;
 132:                     o_Bank_Address <= 0;
 133:                     o_Address_10 <= 0;
 134:                     o_Data_Mask <= 2'b11;
 135:                     r_State <= 2'h0;
 136:                 end
 137:             end
 138: 
 139:             2'h1: begin
 140:                 r_Cmd <= r_Read_Select ? CMD_READ : CMD_WRITE;
 141:                 o_Bank_Address <= r_Address[19];
 142:                 o_Address_10[9:0] <= {2'b00, r_Address[7:0]};
 143:                 o_Address_10[10] <= 1'b0;
 144:                 o_Data_Mask <= 2'b00;
 145:                 r_State <= (r_Read_Select ? i_Read_Request : i_Write_Request) & w_Same_Row_And_Bank ? 2'h1 : 2'h2;
 146:             end
 147: 
 148:             2'h2: begin
 149:                 r_Cmd <= CMD_PRECHARGE;
 150:                 o_Bank_Address <= 0;
 151:                 o_Address_10 <= 11'b100_0000_0000;
 152:                 o_Data_Mask <= 2'b11;
 153:                 r_State <= 2'h0;
 154:             end
 155: 
 156:             2'h3: begin
 157:                 r_Cmd <= CMD_NOP;
 158:                 o_Bank_Address <= 0;
 159:                 o_Address_10 <= 0;
 160:                 o_Data_Mask <= 2'b11;
 161:                 r_State <= 2'h0;
 162:             end
 163: 
 164:         endcase
 165:     end
 166: 
 167: 
 168:     always @(posedge clk)
 169:         r_Read_Data_Valid_Pipe <= {r_Read_Data_Valid_Pipe[TOTAL_READ_LATENCY-2:0], r_State==2'h1 & r_Read_Select};
 170: 
 171: 
 172:     // assign o_Read_DataValid = r_Read_Data_Valid_Pipe[TOTAL_READ_LATENCY-1];
 173:     assign o_Data_Valid = r_Read_Data_Valid_Pipe[TOTAL_READ_LATENCY-1];
 174: 
 175:     always @(posedge clk) begin
 176:         o_Read_Data <= io_DQ_Lines;
 177:         r_DQ_Lines <= (r_State==2'h1) & w_Write_Select;
 178:         r_Write_Data_1 <= i_Write_Data;
 179:         r_Write_Data_2 <= r_Write_Data_1;
 180:     end
 181: 
 182: 
 183:     assign io_DQ_Lines = r_DQ_Lines ? r_Write_Data_2 : 16'hZZZZ;
 184: 
 185: endmodule
